description: Add a Debug tab to the simulation observation view so users can observe how agents think, act, and progress through each cognitive stage (perceive, retrieve, plan, reflect, execute) in real-time.

userStories.title: Backend API: expose SimulationStepCache data per step
userStories.description: As a developer, I need an API endpoint that returns cached cognitive-stage data for a given simulation step so the frontend can display what each agent did at each stage.
acceptanceCriteria: Add `GET /api/v1/simulations/{sim_id}/debug/?step=N` endpoint in `frontend_server/translator/api_views.py`
Returns `{ step: N, stages: { perceive: {<agent>: <data>}, retrieve: {...}, plan: {...}, reflect: {...}, execute: {...} } }` using SimulationStepCache rows
If `step` param omitted, defaults to the simulation's current step
Returns 404 if no cache rows exist for that step
Requires `CanObserveSimulation` permission (already defined in codebase)
Endpoint registered in `frontend_server/frontend_server/urls.py`
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Frontend API client: add fetchDebugStep function
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a typed API client function for the new debug endpoint so SimulatePage can fetch stage data.
acceptanceCriteria: Add `DebugStepData` TypeScript interface to `frontend/src/api/simulations.ts` matching the backend response shape: `{ step: number, stages: Record<string, Record<string, unknown>> }`
Add `fetchDebugStep(simId: string, step?: number): Promise<DebugStepData>` function using the existing authenticated fetch pattern
Function exported from `simulations.ts`
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Frontend: add tab navigation to simulation sidebar
userStories.description: As an observer, I want tab buttons at the top of the simulation right sidebar so I can switch between Agents view and Debug view.
acceptanceCriteria: Add two tab buttons (`Agents` and `Debug`) at the top of the right sidebar in `frontend/src/pages/SimulatePage.tsx`
Active tab has a visible highlight (use existing `retro-button` / `retro-button-primary` classes)

Clicking `Agents` shows the existing agent list panel; clicking `Debug` shows a placeholder `
Debug view coming soon
`
Default active tab is `Agents`
Tab state is local React state (no URL change needed)
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Frontend: Debug tab — step progress pipeline
userStories.description: As an observer, I want to see the current step number and which cognitive stages have completed so I understand where the simulation is in its cycle.
acceptanceCriteria: Inside the Debug tab panel, show the current step number and sim_curr_time (from existing `meta` state)
Show a 5-stage pipeline row: Perceive → Retrieve → Plan → Reflect → Execute
Each stage pill is grey by default; turns green when SimulationStepCache data exists for that stage at the current step (polled via `fetchDebugStep`)
Pipeline updates automatically whenever `meta.step` changes
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Frontend: Debug tab — agent actions feed
userStories.description: As an observer, I want a live feed of each agent's most recent action description and emoji so I can see what every agent is doing at a glance.
acceptanceCriteria: Inside the Debug tab panel, below the step pipeline, show a list of all agents
Each agent row shows: agent name, pronunciatio emoji (from latest MovementRecord `persona_movements`), and act_description
Data sourced from existing `agents` state (already populated in SimulatePage) and latest SSE movement data
Rows update whenever the SSE step event fires
If an agent has no action yet, show a dash placeholder
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Frontend: Debug tab — per-agent cognitive stage detail viewer
userStories.description: As an observer, I want to click on an agent in the Debug tab and see the full output of each cognitive stage for the current step so I can understand their reasoning.
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking an agent row in the Debug tab expands an accordion/detail section below that row
Detail section shows collapsible sub-panels for each stage: Perceive, Retrieve, Plan, Reflect, Execute
Each sub-panel renders the raw JSON from SimulationStepCache as formatted text (use `<pre>` with word-wrap)
Data fetched via `fetchDebugStep` when the user clicks the agent row; show a loading state while fetching
If no cache data exists for a stage, show 'No data for this stage'
Only one agent expanded at a time (clicking another collapses the previous)
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Frontend: Debug tab — auto-refresh on step change
userStories.description: As an observer, I want the debug tab to automatically reload cognitive stage data whenever the simulation advances to a new step.
acceptanceCriteria: When the active tab is `Debug` and `meta.step` increments (detected via `useEffect` dependency on `meta.step`), re-fetch debug data for the new step via `fetchDebugStep`
Stage pipeline pills reset to grey on new step, then update as data arrives
Expanded agent accordion auto-refreshes its stage data for the new step
No unnecessary fetches when the step has not changed
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
